title: lespedeza × miquelii
intro: Lespedeza × miquelii, also known as Miquel's lespedeza, is a hybrid perennial legume plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting cardiovascular health. Lespedeza × miquelii is often prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
